EmailTemplate.description: Recent payment was unsuccessful and we were unable to contact the customer, so this is an email we can use when attempting to contact the customer.
EmailTemplate.name: Failed Payment - Attempt 2
EmailTemplate.subject: Outstanding Payment Required
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Following your recent Kingsbridge policy purchase, we have received notification from your bank that the payment has been unsuccessful.
We have already tried to call you to discuss this and will again in the next few working days.
Unfortunately, if we are unable to speak with you and collect payment, in accordance with the terms and conditions, your policy will be cancelled from inception.
This means the policy will be null and void and you will have no rights to any cover under this policy at any time.
Alternatively, please contact us at your earliest convenience on 01242 808740 to discuss this further.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
